verify.value: All required features are present in the part_tree.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All features are traceable from part_tree to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: Interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Reciprocal interface rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible locking/preload evidence is included for critical joints.
verify.rule: Joint evidence rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.mit: Regularly update material compliance reviews to reflect current standards.
